name: Spanish Chicken & Ham with Mediterranean Vege
recipeInstructions:
1. Soak the clay pot in cold water for 10 minutes.
2. Place the chicken in the pot, season with salt and pepper, and add onion, garlic, and wine. Cover and place in a cold oven.
3. Adjust the heat to 450°F and cook for 40 minutes.
4. Cut the eggplant into thick slices and then into small cubes. Place on a wire cake cooking rack and sprinkle with two teaspoons salt. Allow to stand undisturbed for 10 minutes to drain bitter juices.
5. Heat olive oil in a pan and fry eggplant until lightly browned. Add zucchini and peppers and fry until softened. Add these ingredients, tomatoes, ham, tomato sauce, and bay leaf to the chicken pot. Cover and continue cooking for another 40 minutes.
6. Makes 4 servings.
From "Cooking in Clay" by Irena Chalmers, Potpourri Press, Greensboro, NC, 1974.
